summary: Initial MVP testing complete. All 22 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests passed for Landing, Shop, Login, Register, Admin Panel (all tabs), Profile, and Orders pages. Auth flow working correctly with httpOnly cookies. Admin login redirects to /admin as expected.
action_items: Products show 'No Products Yet' - admin needs to configure Printful API key and sync products for full shop functionality
Body Scan page requires user photo upload - not tested in this iteration (requires real image upload)
seed_data_creation: Admin user seeded on startup via seed_admin() function
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working. Backend APIs: health, auth (register/login/logout/me), products, profile/address, orders, admin endpoints (stats/settings/products/orders/users). Frontend pages: Landing (hero, how-it-works, categories, featured), Shop (filters, search, empty state), Login/Register forms, Admin Panel (Dashboard, Settings, Products, Orders, Users tabs), Profile (user info, measurements, address form), Orders (empty state). Printful integration requires API key to be set in admin settings before products can be synced.
